From child actor to vocal superstar, Miley Cyrus has been in the spotlight for most of her life and knows how to own it.
Our latest Barbie doll is a tribute to this award winner and style icon, known for her genre-blending songs and soulful lyrics.
Her head-to-toe faux leather biker-inspired outfit was featured in her “Something Beautiful” film and includes a bralette, narrow-leg pants, and a dramatic belted jacket with an oversized hood, for a final look that’s totally rockin’.
Purchase limits subject to change at the sole discretion of Mattel.
From June 30, 2026, at 10:00 am PT through July 1, 2026, at 10:00 am PT, only Barbie Club 59 members can buy this item at MattelCreations.com, while supplies last.
